testcase.name: test_get_existing_quotes_and_generate_pdf

failure.message: AssertionError: PDF generation failed for quote c81d4493-e779-455b-9f3e-2592e9cfe7ef: Internal Server Error assert 500 == 200 + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_pdf_generation.py:365: in test_get_existing_quotes_and_generate_pdf assert pdf_response.status_code == 200, f"PDF generation failed for quote {quote_id}: {pdf_response.text}" E AssertionError: PDF generation failed for quote c81d4493-e779-455b-9f3e-2592e9cfe7ef: Internal Server Error E assert 500 == 200 E + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code
